title: iris ruthenica var. typica
intro: Iris ruthenica var. typica, also known as the Siberian iris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iris ruthenica var. typica include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
